testcase.name: test_register_then_login_immediately_no_500
test_back_to_back_logins_same_second_distinct_tokens
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter5_verify.py:75: in test_back_to_back_logins_same_second_distinct_tokens assert d1["access_token"] != d2["access_token"], "back-to-back access_tokens identical" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_refresh_returns_distinct_tokens_back_to_back
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter5_verify.py:88: in test_refresh_returns_distinct_tokens_back_to_back refresh = r_reg.json()["refresh_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'refresh_token'
